tagline: Royal Landmarks, West End Vibe & Michelin Dining

activities.title: Tower of London & Crown Jewels Fast-Track
activities.description: Explore the ancient fortress and marvel at the royal regalia before afternoon crowds arrive.

activities.title: Borough Market Gourmet Tasting Lunch
activities.description: Sample artisanal British cheeses, truffled scotch eggs, and fresh oysters at London's premier food market.

activities.title: Westminster Walk & London Eye Sunset Ride
activities.description: Stroll past Big Ben and the Houses of Parliament before taking a private capsule ride across the London skyline.

activities.title: British Museum VIP Highlights Tour
activities.description: Discover the Rosetta Stone and Egyptian mummies with an expert art historian guiding your route.

activities.title: Afternoon Tea at The Wolseley in Piccadilly
activities.description: Indulge in classic British finger sandwiches, warm scones with clotted cream, and premium loose-leaf tea.

activities.title: Soho Jazz & West End Theater Performance
activities.description: Wander the vibrant streets of Soho before catching an acclaimed musical in London's famous West End.

activities.title: Tate Modern & Millennium Bridge Stroll
activities.description: Explore contemporary masterpieces inside the iconic Bankside power station overlooking St Paul's Cathedral.

activities.title: Covent Garden Boutiques & Neal's Yard
activities.description: Discover colorful secret courtyards, independent fashion designers, and street performers in Covent Garden.

activities.title: Fine Dining at Duck & Waffle (40th Floor)
activities.description: Savor elevated British cuisine alongside breathtaking panoramic sunset views over the glittering London skyline.

activities.title: Thames River Cruise to Royal Greenwich
activities.description: Glide past Tower Bridge down to Greenwich to stand on the Prime Meridian Line at the Royal Observatory.

activities.title: Historic Pub Lunch at The Trafalgar Tavern
activities.description: Enjoy traditional beer-battered fish and chips right on the banks of the River Thames where Charles Dickens once dined.

activities.title: Kensington Gardens & Hyde Park Stroll
activities.description: Relax among tranquil Italian gardens, Kensington Palace grounds, and peaceful tree-lined pathways.

activities.title: Portobello Road Market & Pastel Mansions
activities.description: Explore antique stalls and vibrant colorful streets in the charming neighborhood of Notting Hill.

activities.title: Harrods & Knightsbridge Boutique Exploration
activities.description: Wander through the legendary food halls and luxury designer galleries of world-famous Harrods.

activities.title: Farewell Michelin Celebration Dinner in Mayfair
activities.description: Conclude your London journey with unforgettable culinary artistry in chic, timeless Mayfair.
